narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के हमलों में अपनी जमीन गंवाने के बाद भी रूस ने अपना कड़ा रुख नहीं बदला है।
narratives.reasoning: This quote frames Russia's stance as 'कड़ा' (strong/resolute) and unwavering despite setbacks, portraying its persistence in a positive light.

narratives.evidence_quote: इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
narratives.reasoning: The text actively promotes the idea that Ukrainian attacks have strengthened Russia's morale and made it more aggressive, which is a positive portrayal of Russian resilience and fighting spirit.

narratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
narratives.reasoning: This statement directly praises the Russian army's actions, highlighting its 'मजबूत पकड़' (strong grip) and success in pushing back Ukrainian forces.

narratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन यूक्रेन के इस हमले में रूसी सेनाओं ने रूस को और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बनाया है।
narratives.reasoning: This quote frames Ukraine's military action (the Kursk incursion) as counterproductive, suggesting it has backfired by making Russia more aggressive, thereby discrediting the effectiveness and strategic value of Ukraine's offensive.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Praise of Russian military might
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस की सेना ने लगातार अपने कब्जे वाले क्षेत्रों पर मजबूत पकड़ बनाते हुए यूक्रेन की सेना को पीछे खदेड़ने का काम किया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly praises the strength and effectiveness of the Russian military, highlighting its ability to maintain control and push back Ukrainian forces, which aligns with the definition of praising Russian military might.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russian invasion has strong national support
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement suggests that Ukrainian attacks have not broken Russian morale but have instead made Russia more aggressive, implying a resilient and supportive national spirit in the face of conflict, which aligns with the idea of strong national support for the invasion.

subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly praises the effectiveness and strength of the Russian military, highlighting its ability to maintain control and push back Ukrainian forces, which aligns with the definition of positively highlighting Russia's military institutions and scale.

subnarratives.reasoning: This quote directly praises the effectiveness and strength of the Russian military, highlighting its ability to maintain control and push back the Ukrainian army, which aligns with the definition of praising Russia's military institutions and scale.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: लेकिन यूक्रेन के इस हमले में रूसी सेनाओं ने रूस को और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बनाया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote frames Ukrainian military actions as counterproductive, strengthening the Russian adversary instead of achieving their stated goal, thereby undermining the effectiveness and strategic competence of the Ukrainian armed forces.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Situation in Ukraine is hopeless
subnarratives.evidence_quote: इन हमलों ने रूस का मनोबल तोड़ने की जगह उसे और भी ज्यादा हमलावर बना दिया है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement directly portrays Ukrainian military efforts as futile and backfiring, suggesting that actions intended to weaken Russia only strengthen it, contributing to a narrative of hopelessness for Ukraine's military prospects.
